description: 商科案例分析证据标准 - 适用于 FBLA 等商科竞赛

acceptable_source_types: industry analysis report (McKinsey, BCG, Bain, Deloitte)
trade journal (HBR, MIT Sloan Management Review)
government economic data (Bureau of Labor Statistics, Census)
unacceptable_source_types: competitor marketing materials as factual source

logical_fallacies.name: 计划谬误
logical_fallacies.description: 低估实施所需的成本和时间

logical_fallacies.name: 幸存者偏差
logical_fallacies.description: 仅以成功公司为案例分析，忽略失败案例

logical_fallacies.name: 一刀切策略
logical_fallacies.description: 将通用策略不加调整地应用于特定情境

fatal_defects.name: 缺乏分析框架
fatal_defects.description: 未使用任何公认的商业分析框架

fatal_defects.name: 缺乏竞品分析
fatal_defects.description: 未提及或分析任何竞争对手

fatal_defects.name: 缺乏财务数据
fatal_defects.description: 全文无任何财务数字或量化分析
